case_title: FRIDMAN, YELENA et al VS DISCOVERY MOVING et al

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-02-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-06-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 PLAINTIFF TO ATTEMPT SERVICE ON GV MOVING SYSTEMS INC. AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FRIDMAN, YELENA KONEVSKY, PAVEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DISCOVERY MOVING GV MOVING SYSTEMS INC. DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO GV MOVING SYSTEMS INC.-NO PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY FRIDMAN, YELENA KONEVSKY, PAVEL AS TO DEFENDANT DISCOVERY MOVING GV MOVING SYSTEMS INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-02-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
